mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) FROM hm_query.dim_product p LEFT JOIN hm_query.product_tag_flat pt ON p.product_id = pt.product_id
AND pt.tag IN
#{item}
AND CASE WHEN #{active} = true THEN p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' ELSE p.product_status != 'PUBLISHED' END
AND (p.product_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR p.brand ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
